items.check: ma_vt = '*' or ma_vt = '{$%c[ma_vt]}' or exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = '{$%c[ma_vt]}')

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Chính sách giá bán đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Giá bán đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end
if @ma_vt <> '' begin select nhieu_dvt from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt return end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where &k1;) begin select 'ngay_ban' as field, @$exists as message return end
select @he_so = 1 if @ma_vt <> '' begin if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt and nhieu_dvt = 1) begin select @he_so = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = '*' or ma_vt = @ma_vt) select @he_so = isnull(@he_so, 1) end select @gia_qd_nt2 = case when @he_so = 0 then 0 else round(@gia_nt2 / @he_so, 12) end end
select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where &k2;) begin select 'ngay_ban' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if not (&k0;) begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where not (&k2;) and (&k1;)) begin select 'ngay_ban' as field, @$exists as message return end end

declare @$he_so real select @$he_so = 1 if @ma_vt <> '' begin if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt and nhieu_dvt = 1) begin select @$he_so = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = '*' or ma_vt = @ma_vt) select @$he_so = isnull(@$he_so, 1) end end update @@table set he_so = @$he_so, gia_qd_nt2 = case when @$he_so = 0 then 0 else round(gia_nt2 / @$he_so, 12) end, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where &k1;

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin select rtrim(a.dvt) as dvt, b.ten_dvt%l, a.nhieu_dvt from dmvt a left join dmdvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt where a.ma_vt = @ma_vt return end
